languages.text: "Сочетание бесчисленных факторов, объединяющих помыслы и деяния человека в квинтессенцию благости его бытия в рамках конкретного социума. Я затрудняюсь дать более узкое определение, но это не важно. Гораздо важнее как праведность определяете вы. Ваш выбор испытуемого и будет ответом на этот вопрос".

"The combination of countless factors that unite the thoughts and deeds of a person into the quintessence of the worth of his being within his specific society. I am at a loss to provide a less broad definition, but no matter. Much more important is how you define righteousness. The subject you choose will determine the answer to that question."
languages.original_text: "Сочетание бесчисленных факторов, объединяющих помыслы и деяния человека в квинтессенцию благости его бытия в рамках конкретного социума. Я затрудняюсь дать более узкое определение, но это не важно. Гораздо важнее как праведность определяете вы. Ваш выбор испытуемого и будет ответом на этот вопрос".

I am at a loss to provide a less broad definition, but no matter. Much more important is how you define righteousness. The subject you choose will determine the answer to that question."

"The combination of countless factors that unite the thoughts and deeds of a person into the quintessence of the goodness of his being within his specific society. I am at a loss to provide a less broad definition, but no matter. Much more important is how you define righteousness. The subject you choose will determine the answer to that question."

"The combination of countless factors that unite the thoughts and deeds of a person into the quintessence of the goodness of his being within his specific society. I am at a loss to provide a less broad definition, but no matter. Much more important is how you define righteousness. The subject you choose will determine the answer to that question."

"The combination of countless factors that unite the thoughts and deeds of a person into the quintessence of the worth of his being within his specific society. I am at a loss to provide a less broad definition, but no matter. Much more important is how you define righteousness. The subject you choose will determine the answer to that question."

languages.text: 「数え切れないほどの要素が、人の考えや行動を、その人が属する社会における善の精髄に結びつける。より狭い定義を思いつくことはできないが、それはどうでもよい。もっと重要なのは、あなたが正義をどのように定義するかである。あなたが選ぶテーマが、その答えを決定づけるだろう」
languages.original_text: "The combination of countless factors that unite the thoughts and deeds of a person into the quintessence of the goodness of his being within his specific society. I am at a loss to provide a less broad definition, but no matter. Much more important is how you define righteousness. The subject you choose will determine the answer to that question."

traits.locale_text: 「数え切れないほどの要素が、人の考えや行動を、その人が属する社会における善の精髄に結びつける。より狭い定義を思いつくことはできないが、それはどうでもよい。もっと重要なのは、あなたが正義をどのように定義するかである。あなたが選ぶテーマが、その答えを決定づけるだろう。」

languages.text: “无数因素共同影响一个人，使他的思想和行为在特定的社会环境中，汇聚成其人格中最精华的存在价值。我无法给出更精确的定义，但这无关紧要。更重要的是，您如何定义正义。您选择的实验体，将决定那个问题的答案。”
languages.original_text: "The combination of countless factors that unite the thoughts and deeds of a person into the quintessence of the worth of his being within his specific society. I am at a loss to provide a less broad definition, but no matter. Much more important is how you define righteousness. The subject you choose will determine the answer to that question."

traits.locale_text: “无数因素共同影响一个人，使他的思想和行为在特定的社会环境中，汇聚成其人格中最精华的存在价值。我无法给出更精确的定义，但这无关紧要。更重要的是，您如何定义正义。您选择的实验体，将决定那个问题的答案。”

languages.text: «La combinación de innumerables factores que une los pensamientos y acciones de una persona con la quintaesencia del valor de su ser dentro de su sociedad en concreto. Lamento no poder proporcionarle una definición menos ambigua, pero no es relevante. Lo que es más importante es su definición de virtud. El sujeto que elija determinará la respuesta a esa pregunta».
languages.original_text: "The combination of countless factors that unite the thoughts and deeds of a person into the quintessence of the worth of his being within his specific society. I am at a loss to provide a less broad definition, but no matter. Much more important is how you define righteousness. The subject you choose will determine the answer to that question."

traits.locale_text: «La combinación de innumerables factores que une los pensamientos y acciones de una persona con la quintaesencia del valor de su ser dentro de su sociedad en concreto. Lamento no poder proporcionarle una definición menos ambigua, pero no es relevante. Lo que es más importante es su definición de virtud. El sujeto que elija determinará la respuesta a esa pregunta».

languages.text: "Die Kombination zahlloser Faktoren, die sämtliche Gedanken und Taten einer Person zu einer Quintessenz ihres Wertes innerhalb der jeweiligen Gesellschaft vereint. Eine weniger breite Definition kann ich Euch nicht geben, aber das spielt auch keine Rolle. Entscheidend ist, wie Ihr Rechtschaffenheit definiert. Das Subjekt, das Ihr auswählt, wird die Antwort auf diese Frage bestimmen."
languages.original_text: "The combination of countless factors that unite the thoughts and deeds of a person into the quintessence of the worth of his being within his specific society. I am at a loss to provide a less broad definition, but no matter. Much more important is how you define righteousness. The subject you choose will determine the answer to that question."

traits.locale_text: "Die Kombination zahlloser Faktoren, die sämtliche Gedanken und Taten einer Person zu einer Quintessenz ihres Wertes innerhalb der jeweiligen Gesellschaft vereint. Eine weniger breite Definition kann ich Euch nicht geben, aber das spielt auch keine Rolle. Entscheidend ist, wie Ihr Rechtschaffenheit definiert. Das Subjekt, das Ihr auswählt, wird die Antwort auf diese Frage bestimmen."

languages.text: « La combinaison d'innombrables facteurs qui conjuguent les pensées et les actes d'une personne pour constituer la quintessence de sa valeur au sein de la société à laquelle elle appartient. Je suis incapable de vous donner une définition moins vague, mais c'est sans importance. Ce qui compte avant tout, c'est ce que la vertu représente à vos yeux. Le sujet que vous choisirez déterminera la réponse à cette question. »
languages.original_text: "The combination of countless factors that unite the thoughts and deeds of a person into the quintessence of the worth of his being within his specific society. I am at a loss to provide a less broad definition, but no matter. Much more important is how you define righteousness. The subject you choose will determine the answer to that question."

traits.locale_text: « La combinaison d'innombrables facteurs qui conjuguent les pensées et les actes d'une personne pour constituer la quintessence de sa valeur au sein de la société à laquelle elle appartient. Je suis incapable de vous donner une définition moins vague, mais c'est sans importance. Ce qui compte avant tout, c'est ce que la vertu représente à vos yeux. Le sujet que vous choisirez déterminera la réponse à cette question. »

languages.text: "Bir kişinin düşüncelerini ve eylemlerini, belirli bir toplum içindeki varlığının değerinin özünde birleştiren sayısız faktörün birleşimi. Daha dar bir tanım yapmakta zorlanıyorum. Tabii bu önemsiz. Asıl önemli olan, sizin doğruluğu nasıl tanımladığınız. Seçeceğiniz denek, bu sorunun cevabını belirleyecek."
languages.original_text: "The combination of countless factors that unite the thoughts and deeds of a person into the quintessence of the worth of his being within his specific society. I am at a loss to provide a less broad definition, but no matter. Much more important is how you define righteousness. The subject you choose will determine the answer to that question."

traits.locale_text: "Bir kişinin düşüncelerini ve eylemlerini, belirli bir toplum içindeki varlığının değerinin özünde birleştiren sayısız faktörün birleşimi. Daha dar bir tanım yapmakta zorlanıyorum. Tabii bu önemsiz. Asıl önemli olan, sizin doğruluğu nasıl tanımladığınız. Seçeceğiniz denek, bu sorunun cevabını belirleyecek."
